## LibraryData.IResolveImportRootOptions.allowLooseFiles property

Whether to treat loose \*.json/\*.yaml/\*.yml files in a directory as collections. Default: true

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly allowLooseFiles?: boolean;
```
